heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 150507 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation has the exclusive right to use the name “National Conference of State Societies, Washington, District of Columbia” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15050736:418., ; , , (2), .Apr. 3, 1952, ch. 131, § 1866 Stat. 41Pub. L. 90–38282 Stat. 292July 5, 1968The words “in carrying out its purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
